warning: AUTO-GENERATED. Do not hand-edit. Run `thetacog regen-hooks` after editing rules in the dashboard.

hooks.description: Heavy LLM engagement-anchor scorer, async. Blog drafts only.
Heavy LLM voice audit, async. Spawns voice-audit-llm.sh.
Lexical voice-filter against SQLite voice_rules. Fast.
Pre-push lexical only — book HTML rebuild + deep-link gate.

business-comms.name: business-comms-puffery
business-comms.description: Puffery without substance. Acceptable as load-bearing move with substance underneath; flag for review.

business-comms.name: business-comms-name-at-start
business-comms.description: LinkedIn replies prepopulate @name. Drafts must start with the first substantive sentence, not "Name —".

structural.name: structural-six-needs-required
structural.description: Blog posts use Connection → Contribution → Growth → Uncertainty → Certainty → Significance as named A-F sections. Argument lives in Uncertainty.

structural.name: structural-canonical-tile-form
structural.description: Tile identity must render as {emoji} {rank}.{FullName}, never raw shorthand like A:Law.

voice.name: paradox-no-tell-feelings
voice.pattern: \b(did you feel|do you feel|you may feel|if you felt|if you recognized)\b
voice.description: Paradox tells stories that MOVE you; the reader names the feeling silently. Never instruct internal state.

voice.name: no-meta-announcements
voice.pattern: \b(in this section|in this post|next section|next paragraph|the post you have just read)\b
voice.description: No meta-commentary about the prose itself. Show, do not announce.

voice.name: voice-technique-name-leak
voice.description: Technique names stay in docs/memory, not published prose.
